basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Urdu University (MANUU) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 2 Junior Engineer (Civil) Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the MANUU office with original documents and self-attested copies.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years experience
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech. in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University. Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years of experience in the relevant field (Civil) in Central CPWD / State PWD or similar Organized Services / Statutory or Autonomous Organizations / Central / State Universities or reputed Private construction company. Desirable: One year relevant experience for B.E/B.Tech candidates, Working knowledge of AUTOCAD, other relevant software, Knowledge of Urdu.

all_official_links.label: Download MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.maulana_azad_national_urdu_university_ma: B.E/B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years experience

content_sections.heading: MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the MANUU Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: B.E/B.Tech. in Civil Engineering from a recognized Institute/University. Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years of experience in the relevant field (Civil) in Central CPWD / State PWD or similar Organized Services / Statutory or Autonomous Organizations / Central / State Universities or reputed Private construction company. Desirable: One year relevant experience for B.E/B.Tech candidates, Working knowledge of AUTOCAD, other relevant software, Knowledge of Urdu.

content_sections.heading: MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to attend the walk-in interview for MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Engineer (Civil) posts at MANUU is scheduled for 27 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.E/B.Tech. in Civil Engineering or a Diploma in Civil Engineering with three years of relevant experience to be eligible for the Junior Engineer (Civil) role.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position is 30 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position will receive a consolidated salary ranging from Rs. 32,000/- to Rs. 40,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Engineer (Civil) post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Junior Engineer (Civil) position announced by MANUU.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in. Candidates need to attend the interview in person.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for MANUU Junior Engineer (Civil) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: You should carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Junior Engineer (Civil) role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the walk-in interview scheduled to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at the MANUU office in Hyderabad, Telangana. Specific venue details will be in the official notification.
